custom_css: #custom-logo-container { position: relative; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 5px #fde047) drop-shadow(0 0 10px #f97316); animation: flicker 1.5s infinite alternate ease-in-out; } @keyframes flicker { 0% { transform: scale(1) rotate(-0.5deg); filter: drop-shadow(0 0 4px #fde047) drop-shadow(0 0 12px #f97316) brightness(1); } 25% { transform: scale(1.02) rotate(0.5deg); filter: drop-shadow(0 0 6px #ffcc00) drop-shadow(0 0 15px #ff4500) brightness(1.2); } 50% { transform: scale(0.99) rotate(-0.2deg); filter: drop-shadow(0 0 5px #fde047) drop-shadow(0 0 10px #f97316) brightness(1.1); } 75% { transform: scale(1.01) rotate(0.3deg); filter: drop-shadow(0 0 7px #ffcc00) drop-shadow(0 0 18px #ff4500) brightness(1.3); } 100% { transform: scale(1) rotate(0deg); filter: drop-shadow(0 0 4px #fde047) drop-shadow(0 0 12px #f97316) brightness(1); } } #fallback-title { background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #fff 20%, #fde047 50%, #f97316 90%); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; }
